audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with moderate pitch and speed, accompanied by a noticeable background noise that adds a layer of ambient sound.
temporal_description: A man with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a dark red jacket over a plaid shirt, is standing in a dimly lit bedroom. He is positioned near a doorway, facing away from the camera, and appears to be looking into another room. A lit lamp sits on a bedside table next to a bed, casting a warm glow on the pink walls. A circular decorative item hangs on the wall, and a set of French doors with curtains is visible in the background. The man occasionally shifts his posture and turns slightly, but remains mostly still, gazing into the adjacent room.
